title: Day 1 Lesson 2 - Show us
html:
Listen to the teacher and go to our Flip board to leave your first video...in Japanese! You will also be able to hear what other students taking the course say!

Flip password: GGNnek0#

Please note that you don't have to show your face if you don't want to. You can cover it with an emoji, when you record your video, use "pixel mode" or just hide it ;)

ビデオと一緒に、あなたが言いたいことをテキストで送ってください。テキストはローマ字でもひらがなでもいいです。When you send us a video, please also add your response or script as text as well. Feel free to use romaji or hiragana.
